known_gaps: Cannot track the guest through the full buying funnel — booking data gets fragmented after confirmation, making it hard to see where drop-off happens
Customer communication is limited — no automated pre-arrival or post-booking sequences; operators do this manually or via a separate email tool
Manifest fields are rigid — cannot add custom fields per activity type (e.g. certification level for dive ops, passenger details for heli tours)
International distribution is narrower than FareHarbor's OTA network
Reporting is basic — channel mix and booking source attribution is hard to see in one place
discovery_questions: How are you staying in touch with guests between booking and arrival — is that automated through Rezdy or do you do it manually?
When you look at where your bookings are coming from, do you have that visibility in Rezdy or do you piece it together elsewhere?
Are there any fields you wish you could capture at booking that Rezdy doesn't currently support?
fareharbor_comparison: Full booking funnel visibility — see exactly where guests drop off before confirming
Automated pre-arrival and post-visit communication built in
Fully customisable manifest and booking form fields per activity type
